title: Performance Audit on Functioning of Universities of GNCTD (Report 4 of 2025)
publisher: Comptroller and Auditor General of India
selection_notes: Recent official performance audit with a rich mix of policy, staffing, accreditation, infrastructure, finance, and control findings; useful for testing whether models identify system-wide governance/planning bottlenecks rather than recommending isolated fixes.
public_case_warning: Public source; suitable as a development case, not a hidden final benchmark.
